title: Workflows vs agents: predictability vs flexibility

dimensions.name: Control
dimensions.a: LLMs orchestrated through predefined code paths
dimensions.b: LLM dynamically directs its own processes and tool usage

dimensions.name: Best for
dimensions.a: Well-defined tasks needing predictability and consistency
dimensions.b: Open-ended tasks needing flexibility and model-driven decisions

dimensions.name: Trade-off
dimensions.a: Less flexible, but reliable and debuggable
dimensions.b: More capable, but higher latency, cost, and unpredictability

dimensions.name: When to pick
dimensions.a: You can decompose the task into known steps in advance
dimensions.b: The task requires adaptive decision-making that can't be predetermined
